zh_TW: 手蜥疊手蜥　一起蜥救蜥
en: Help the lizard stucked at sky!

zh_TW: — 或按下任意鍵開始遊戲 —

有蜥蜴被困在天上了！快來救牠，蜥蜴們會在充滿幹勁的移動7秒後裝死藉此施展漂浮術，請幫助蜥蜴們搭建出救援蜥梯拯救蜥蜥吧！

🎮  操作：
    A / D  或  ← →  ：移動
    空白鍵 / ↑ / W ：跳躍
    E ：將倒數快轉到 3 秒
    R（長壓 2 秒）：重新開始

💡  策略提示：
	讓前幾隻蜥蜴在好位置裝死，搭起救援的蜥梯！
en:
Lizards are stuck in the sky! Come to the rescue!
After 7 seconds of energetic moving, they play dead to perform 'Lizard Levitation.' Help them stack up a Living Lizard Ladder to save the day!

🎮  Controls:
    A / D  or  ← →  : Move
    Space / ↑ / W : Jump
    E : Fast-forward timer to 3s
    R (hold 2s) : Restart

💡  Strategy:
    Position the first few lizards carefully before they 'freeze' to build a solid foundation for your rescue ladder!

zh_TW: A/D: 移動   空白/↑/W: 跳躍   E: 快轉剩3秒   R: 重來(長按)
en: A/D: Move   Space/↑/W: Jump   E: Skip to 3s   R: Restart (hold)

zh_TW:
✨  蜥蜴你們救了我！

我告訴你一個古老的咒語：

「蜥萬有錢」

你就會有錢喔！
en:
✨  You saved me!

Let me tell you an ancient spell:

「蜥萬有錢」
